allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); d=r['data']; print\('Name:', d['name']\); print\('Symbol:', d['symbol']\); print\('Price:', d['price']\); print\('MarketCap:', d['marketCap']\); print\('Source:', r.get\('source'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); d=r['data']; print\('OK'\); print\('Name:', d['name']\); print\('Symbol:', d['symbol']\); print\('Price:', d['price']\); print\('Source:', r.get\('source'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Error:', r.get\('error'\)\); vals=r.get\('result',{}\).get\('value',[]\); print\('Holders:', len\(vals\)\); [print\(f'  {v[\\"address\\"][:12]}... {v[\\"uiAmount\\"]}'\) for v in vals[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Name:', d.get\('name'\), 'Symbol:', d.get\('symbol'\), 'Tags:', d.get\('tags'\), 'Mint:', d.get\('address',''\)[:20]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=d['pairs'][0] if d.get\('pairs'\) else {}; print\('boosts:', p.get\('boosts'\)\); print\('info:', json.dumps\(p.get\('info',{}\), indent=2\)[:400]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); v=r.get\('result',{}\).get\('value',[]\); print\('Alchemy holders:', len\(v\)\); print\('Error:', r.get\('error',{}\).get\('message',''\)[:60]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d[0] if isinstance\(d,list\) else d, indent=2\)[:600]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('holder:', d.get\('data',{}\).get\('holder'\)\); print\(str\(d\)[:300]\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('holders total:', j.holderStats?.total, '\\nholderStats:', JSON.stringify\(j.holderStats, null,2\).slice\(0,300\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); hs=d.get\('holderStats',{}\); print\('total holders:', hs.get\('total'\)\); print\('geckoHolders key:', d.get\('_debug_holders','N/A'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if 'holder' in k.lower\(\) or k=='holderStats'}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('holders key:', d.get\('holderStats',{}\).get\('total','MISSING'\)\); print\('holders field:', d.get\('holders','NO'\)\); print\(list\(d.keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); attr=d['data']['attributes']; h=attr.get\('holders'\); print\('holders raw:', h, type\(h\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('holders:', d.get\('holders'\)\); print\('holderStats:', json.dumps\(d.get\('holderStats'\), indent=2\)\); print\('realHolderCount would be geckoInfo.holders'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('holders:', d.get\('holders'\)\); print\('holderStats.total:', d.get\('holderStats',{}\).get\('total'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('holders:', d['holders']\); print\('holderStats.total:', d['holderStats']['total']\); print\('holderDataSource:', d.get\('holderDataSource','N/A'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\)\); print\('error:', d.get\('error','none'\)\); data=d.get\('data',{}\); print\('price:', data.get\('price'\)\); print\('holders:', data.get\('holders'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('candles:', len\(d.get\('data',[]\)\), 'error:', d.get\('error','none'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok, price:', d['data']['price']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); attr=d['data']['attributes']; h=attr.get\('holders'\); print\('holders:', h\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); const pools=d.data||[]; console.log\('pools found:', pools.length\); pools.slice\(0,2\).forEach\(p=>console.log\('pool:', p.id, 'price_usd:', p.attributes?.base_token_price_usd, 'addr:', p.attributes?.address?.slice\(0,20\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); const p=d?.data?.[0]; console.log\(JSON.stringify\({id:p?.id, attr: {name:p?.attributes?.name, network:p?.relationships?.network?.data?.id, fdv:p?.attributes?.fdv_usd, vol24h:p?.attributes?.volume_usd?.h24, created:p?.attributes?.pool_created_at}}, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('newPairs:', d.data?.newPairs?.length, 'trending:', d.data?.trending?.length, 'bestVol:', d.data?.bestVolume?.length\); if\(d.data?.newPairs?.[0]\) console.log\('sample:', JSON.stringify\(d.data.newPairs[0]\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('newPairs count:', len\(d['data']['newPairs']\)\); [print\(p['name'], p['createdAt']\) for p in d['data']['newPairs'][:3]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('bestVolume:', len\(d['data']['bestVolume']\), 'trending:', len\(d['data']['trending']\), 'newPairs:', len\(d['data']['newPairs']\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('bv:', len\(d['bestVolume']\), 'tr:', len\(d['trending']\), 'np:', len\(d['newPairs']\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d['data']['bestVolume'][:2], indent=2\) if d['data']['bestVolume'] else 'EMPTY'\); print\('chains:', d['data']['chains']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', len\(d.get\('data',[]\)\), 'errors:', d.get\('errors','none'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pairs=d.get\('pairs',[]\) or []; print\('count:', len\(pairs\)\); [print\(p['pairCreatedAt'], p['baseToken']['symbol'], '/', p['quoteToken']['symbol']\) for p in pairs[:5] if p.get\('pairCreatedAt'\)]")
